title: Romance Prawn Stir Fry
description: Quick and flavorful stir-fry with romance sauce and prawns. Serve with steamed vegetables and rice for a delicious and easy meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the prawns and cook until pink and just cooked through, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the prawns from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
Add the sliced bell pepper and stir-fry for 2 minutes.
Add the trimmed snow peas and stir-fry for another minute.
Return the cooked prawns to the skillet and pour in the romance sauce.
Stir-fry everything together for 1-2 minutes until the sauce has thickened.
Season with soy sauce and sugar to taste.
